name: Sizzling Bangus Sisig
description: Sizzling chopped milkfish mixed with onions, peppers, and savory seasonings, served hot on a sizzling plate for a flavorful Filipino favorite.

name: Sizzling Crispy Sisig
description: Crispy pork sisig served on a hot sizzling plate with onions, peppers, and bold savory flavors for a satisfying Filipino classic.
